skills.name: 백엔드 엔지니어 (Backend)
skills.description: APIs, repositories, authentication, database access, and server-side business logic.

skills.name: 프론트엔드 엔지니어 (Frontend)
skills.description: Web UI, forms, components, styling, and browser-side integration.

skills.name: 모바일 엔지니어 (Mobile)
skills.description: Mobile screens, device capabilities, and mobile-first integration patterns.

skills.name: 디버깅 해결사 (Debug)
skills.description: Root-cause analysis, failure reproduction, and surgical fixes.

skills.name: 품질 검수자 (QA)
skills.description: Findings-first review, risk checks, and quality verification.

skills.name: 기획 관리자 (PM)
skills.description: Planning, scoping, task breakdown, and coordination guidance.

skills.name: 워크플로우 오케스트레이터 (Orchestrator)
skills.description: Create task locks, choose templates, and coordinate multi-skill execution.

skills.name: 워크플로우 가이드 (Guide)
skills.description: Manual fallback workflow for docs, naming, and lightweight coordination.

skills.name: 커밋 담당자 (Commit)
skills.description: Conventional commit guidance and commit hygiene.

skills.name: 프로젝트 커스터마이저 (Customizer)
skills.description: Customize local skill packs and project-specific Codex assets.

skills.name: 프로젝트 맞춤 조율자 (Project Fit)
skills.description: Run project-fit customization and verification in one coordinated flow.

skills.name: 스킬 관리 (Manage Skills)
skills.description: Maintain skill coverage, registries, routing maps, and validation scripts.

skills.name: 구현 검증 파이프라인 (Verify Implementation)
skills.description: Run all project verify skills and consolidate the results.

skills.name: 관측성 검증 (Verify Observability)
skills.description: Validate trace IDs, log masking, and middleware observability guardrails.

skills.name: 룸 파이프라인 검증 (Verify Room Pipeline)
skills.description: Validate room collection, parsing, DTO aliases, and pipeline consistency.

skills.name: API 스키마 검증 (Verify API Schema)
skills.description: Validate routers, DTOs, request/response models, and API contract integrity.

skills.name: 데이터베이스 레이어 검증 (Verify Database Layer)
skills.description: Validate repositories, CRUD paths, schema assumptions, and query safety.

skills.name: 크롤러 엔진 검증 (Verify Crawler Engine)
skills.description: Validate crawler behavior, parsing rules, regex extraction, and scraping reliability.

skills.name: 비즈니스 로직 검증 (Verify Business Logic)
skills.description: Validate service-layer rules, scheduling, exceptions, and domain behaviors.

skills.name: 한글 주석 검증 (Verify Korean Comments)
skills.description: Validate Korean rationale and usage comments on new definitions.

skills.name: 카파시 가이드라인 (Karpathy)
skills.description: Keep solutions simple, surgical, and goal-driven.

hooks.description: Run pre-execution guards such as git checks, skill-lock checks, and protected-file checks.

hooks.description: Write postflight reports and update skill-lock metadata after work.
